context_for_next_testing_agent: v5.1.0 Telegram Integration verified. Key changes: (1) New telegram.js module sends trading alerts via Telegram bot. (2) New endpoints: GET /api/telegram/status, POST /api/telegram/setup, POST /api/telegram/discover, POST /api/telegram/test, POST /api/telegram/alerts. (3) Bot token: 8772018409:AAHml0B9cGBylPugrAudxo_sxMtAtLIu9HI, Chat ID: 5861330845. (4) All 6 alert types enabled: signals, trade_entry, trade_exit, daily_summary, guard_blocks, exit_advice. (5) Routes now = 13 (was 12). (6) Exit Advisor sends Telegram alerts for non-HOLD advice. (7) Signal generator sends Telegram trade entry alerts. (8) News module sends Telegram signal alerts.
